description: Balanced community resilience across social capital institutions access economics information adaptation equity and implementation burden.
Prioritizes trust relationships mutual aid bonding bridging and linking social capital.
Prioritizes institutional capacity coordination local governance public finance and organizational competence.
Prioritizes access to energy water health food transport shelters communications and services.
Prioritizes trusted warnings communication risk literacy accessibility and misinformation resilience.
Prioritizes learning adaptation transformation local knowledge and future viability.
Prioritizes vulnerable residents anti-displacement access justice and community voice.
Penalizes strategies with higher implementation burden when administrative funding or civic capacity is constrained.
